summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.providers; import java.io.File; import org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITreeContentProvider; import org.eclipse.jface.viewers.Viewer; public class FileTreeContentProvider implements ITreeContentProvider { @Override public Object[] getChildren(Object arg0) { return getElements(arg0); } @Override public Object getParent(Object arg0) { return ((File) arg0).getParentFile(); }
